subject: Fwd: RE: Francesco test
body:
I asked Jeff to personally choose the pictures from my test; this was his response;

Jeff Fuller <Jeff@mc2mm.com> wrote:  From: "Jeff Fuller" <Jeff@mc2mm.com>
To: "'nadia marcinkova'" <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
Subject: RE: Francesco test
Date: Tue, 25 Mar 2008 15:25:43 -0400

    I finish all the books but Anetta arranges the tests....when your pictures are all edited and approved we will lay out the book...not to worry as I approve all books.
   
  Jeff Fuller
  MC2 Model Management
  6 West 14th Street
  New York, NY  10011
